ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled_tuned]   3  4    2     3      1   The response is relevant but lacks naturalness and persona consistency with the Witch oracle's cryptic nature. Short note: Improvement needed in tone to match witch-like mystique.

[baseline_no_context]                       2   3    4     3      2   Lacks contextual relevance, but maintains a neutral persona and naturalness suitable for an oracle of any kind. Short note: Needs more specificity regarding the situation at hand to improve ratings across all categories.
